_meta.description: 7×7 symmetric audience overlap matrix between competitor archetypes. Values 0.0-1.0 represent fraction of shared audience. Used by propose_collab to split engagement. Derived from niche proximity (same-niche pairs ~0.4-0.65, cross-niche ~0.05-0.20).
_meta.source: Estimated from Rival IQ 2025 cross-industry overlap patterns + niche proximity heuristic
